evidence: I found a lot of these shows about teen girls nowadays to be a little strange...
This season had a lot of interesting characters and some pretty good gameplay.
Overall, this was an enjoyable season.
Things started out full speed from the very beginning.
The ending of this season was very unsatisfying.
I enjoyed seeing Kelly Wentworth play again.
The gameplay this season was great.
I was very excited to re-watch this season.
I hope she comes back and plays one more time in the future.
This season had a lot of great moments too.
I enjoyed the moment when she talked about her arranged marriage.
I was sad to see her go.

summary: The user enjoys reality competition shows, particularly those with engaging gameplay and interesting characters. They have a mixed preference for pacing and narrative complexity, often valuing emotional engagement and character development over production quality.
